CustomField.formula: IMAGE( If( Age_in_Days__c < 10, "/img/samples/light_green.gif", IF( Age_in_Days__c < 15, "/img/samples/light_yellow.gif", "/img/samples/light_red.gif")), "Lead Age Indicator")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The lead is green if the Age in Days is less than 10, yellow if less than 15, otherwise it is red.
CustomField.label: PKI Lead Age Indicator
